title: passiflora lanata
intro: Passiflora lanata, also known as the woolly passionflower, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Passiflora. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to interact with the neurotransmitter GABA, which can produce a calming effect. The health benefits of Passiflora lanata include reducing anxiety and insomnia, promoting relaxation, and relieving symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to support sleep, mood, and overall well-being.
